label: Sales demo dating-profile photo activity taxonomy
guidance: This file defines the allowed vocabulary. Composition requirements live in photo_composition_index.json.

categories.label: Clear solo portrait
categories.purpose: Primary dating-app image with a clearly visible face, natural light, and no ambiguity about which person is the profile owner.

categories.label: Restaurant, cafe, or food moment
categories.purpose: Shows dateability, warmth, taste, and a normal post-event or weekend social setting.

categories.label: Active lifestyle
categories.purpose: Shows motion or hobbies without making the app feel like a running-only product.

categories.label: Culture or nightlife
categories.purpose: Shows evening, arts, music, gallery, museum, or going-out context.

categories.label: Creative or work-adjacent
categories.purpose: Shows ambition, taste, craft, or professional identity without looking like a LinkedIn photo.

categories.label: Friends or group moment
categories.purpose: Shows social proof while keeping the profile owner unmistakably in focus.

categories.label: Everyday candid
categories.purpose: Shows grounded personality through bookstore, market, cooking, neighborhood, or casual weekend context.

categories.label: Travel or outdoor lifestyle
categories.purpose: Adds visual variety through outdoor, day-trip, park, beach, hiking, or city-exploration context.

activities.label: Group walk or casual social outing
